---
title: "The Rev. James Duke Coleridge"
---

## The Rev. James Duke Coleridge

**Dates:** (1789-1857)

### Description

Rector of Thorverton

### Biography

He was eldest brother of Sir John Taylor Coleridge and father of Sophia (Coleridge) Martyn. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from April 22nd [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
